aliases.comment: Pebble configuration color value encoded as a CSS hex string.
aliases.name: Color

comment:
Typed declarations for Pebble companion preference pages.

The same schema describes the generated, Slate-like configuration page and the
decoder used when Pebble returns saved values.

    type alias Settings =
        { showDate : Bool
        , units : Units
        }

    type Units
        = Celsius
        | Fahrenheit

    settings : Schema Settings
    settings =
        schema "Settings" Settings
            |> section "Display"
                (\s ->
                    s
                        |> field "showDate" (toggle "Show date" True)
                        |> field "units"
                            (choice "Units"
                                [ choiceOption Celsius "c" "Celsius"
                                , choiceOption Fahrenheit "f" "Fahrenheit"
                                ]
                            )
                )

# Schemas
@docs Schema, Error, schema, section, field, decoder, decodeString, decodeResponse

# Controls
@docs Control, Field, Section, toggle, text, number, slider, color, choice, ChoiceOption, choiceOption, sendToWatch

# Colors
@docs Color, black, white, green, blue, yellow
name: Pebble.Companion.Preferences

unions.comment: Opaque preference schema that decodes to `settings`.
unions.name: Schema

unions.comment: Decode errors from a saved configuration payload.
unions.name: Error

unions.comment: A typed control for a single field.
unions.name: Control

unions.comment: A typed field. The generator uses the definition; Elm code uses the decoder.
unions.name: Field

unions.comment: A choice option mapping an encoded webview value to a real Elm value.
unions.name: ChoiceOption

values.comment: Start a schema with a record or custom type constructor.
values.name: schema

values.comment: Add a visual section. Fields added inside the callback are grouped under the section title.
values.name: section
values.type: String -> (Schema partial -> Schema next) -> Schema partial -> Schema next

values.comment:
Add a typed field to the schema.

Fields are decoded in the order they are added, so this works naturally with
Elm record constructors and normal pipeline style.
values.name: field
values.type: String -> Control value -> Schema (value -> next) -> Schema next

values.comment: Decode the saved Pebble webview payload.
values.name: decoder

values.comment: Decode a saved JSON string into typed settings.
values.name: decodeString
values.type: Schema settings -> String -> Result Error settings

values.comment: Decode Pebble's optional `webviewclosed` response into typed settings.
values.name: decodeResponse
values.type: Schema settings -> Maybe String -> Result Error settings

values.comment: A slider with minimum, maximum, step, and default values.
values.name: slider
values.type: String -> { min : Float, max : Float, step : Float, default : Float } -> Control Float

values.comment: A color picker encoded as a CSS hex string.
values.name: color

values.comment: A select/radio-style choice that decodes to real Elm values.
values.name: choice

values.comment: Define one encoded choice value and the Elm value it represents.
values.name: choiceOption

values.comment:
Declare the phone-to-watch message constructor emitted when this preference is saved.

This is debugger/build metadata; the typed decoder still determines the Elm value
seen by the companion app.
values.name: sendToWatch
